title: Pathways
description: Players travel a lot. Add a touch of realism, now each player leaves a trail, trampling the grass.
body:
## Each player travels a lot, add variety and keep track of where players go most often.


### Commands:
/walk-update - Update loaded config. Permission - "walk.reload"

### Config:
distance: 3.0 - The minimum distance from the previous point at which it is possible to replace the block.
timeUpdate: 20 - Once in how many ticks, the ability to update the block under the player will be checked.
Chance: 30 - The chance with which the block will be replaced under the player.
